message:
fix(search): Fix StringInterner O(n) to O(1) lookup performance

The original StringInterner implementation iterated through all cache
entries to find a match, which was O(n) for n cached strings. For the
10K entry limit, this could add significant latency to cache key lookups.

Fix: Use LruCache<Arc<str>, Arc<str>> where both key and value are the
same Arc. This enables O(1) lookup via LruCache::peek/get using the
Borrow<str> trait, while preserving LRU eviction semantics.

Changes:
- Change cache type from LruCache<Arc<str>, ()> to LruCache<Arc<str>, Arc<str>>
- Replace O(n) iteration with O(1) peek()/get() calls
- Store same Arc as both key and value for retrieval

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
